heading: Title in trust to United States
label: 5138 Title in trust to United States
text: Title to land acquired by a tribe or tribal corporation with a loan made or insured pursuant to sections 5136 to 5143 of this title may, with the approval of the Secretary of the Interior, be taken by the United States in trust for the tribe or tribal corporation.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 489 of this title
